message: The WGSP logo feels too small relative to the show title - can we bump it to match the prominence it gets on the actual broadcast banner?
Agreed - I'll scale it up to 120px wide and re-align. Also moving it left of the show title per the FCC identification guidelines.
The gold (#C8902A) on the light background is reading warm enough. Let's keep it. Just make sure the contrast passes WCAG AA before we export for the web version.
The health fair date needs to read clearly at a glance - right now the date badge is lost behind the photo. Can we try a white overlay with reduced opacity behind it?
Sandra's right. Also - Deacon Mosley confirmed the date is October 3. Update the badge text from 'Date to confirm' to 'October 3, 2026'.
For the anniversary episode promo, let's add a '7 Years on Air' banner across the top left corner - I can rough out a ribbon shape if you want to review before I build the component.
Yes - but keep the ribbon subtle. The show started in 2019, so 7 years lands October 2026. The tagline should be: 'Seven Years of Saturday Mornings. Still going.'
The sponsor badge for Covenant Insurance Group needs their actual logo slot here - I'll send TJ their brand kit this week. For now mark this as pending.
Story frame background is too dark - it's reading more funeral than morning light. Try earth clay (#B87333) or a warm cream. I want people to feel the sunrise, not the evening.
Swapped to warm cream (#F5E6C8). Let me know if this reads better on both iPhone and Android preview.
New Year program looks beautiful. Just confirm that 'Sunrise Service - 6:00 AM' is on the front cover - Pastor Greer wants that time front and center.
Rev. Angela Dawson is confirmed for the January 31 episode. Her bio card needs: 'Chaplain at Golden Heart Medical Center, 15 years in clinical pastoral care.' Photo coming via email this week.
Should we add a headshot slot that's clearly labeled so whoever sends the photo knows exactly what size to give us? I keep getting the wrong dimensions.
Mitchell's Flowers sent over their updated logo - replacing the old one in the sponsor slide pack. Uploading to the shared assets page now.

Fall festival poster is a good start. The title needs to say 'Trunk-or-Treat & Fall Festival' - Rebecca emcees, so my name goes in smaller type below the church name, not at the top. Keep it about the community.
CPE orientation booklet - page 3 heading should read 'A Word from Your Supervisor' not 'Director's Note'. Dr. Vickers prefers supervisor language per APC standards.
Welcome packet looks clean. Make sure the CPE residency schedule shows rotation through oncology, ICU, and palliative - those are the three units. Don't list specific patient floors.
Podcast cover art for Season 8 is ready for your final approval. I kept the sunrise gradient and moved the Rebecca avatar to lower-right so the show title has more breathing room.
Approved. One last thing - make sure @morningreflectionsrebecca appears in the bottom-right corner at 14pt minimum. It needs to be readable at thumbnail size.
January 24 episode guest is confirmed - need a promo graphic exported at 1080x1080 for Instagram and 1200x630 for Facebook by Friday. The show topic is on resilience and faith during hard seasons.
